---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that looks broken or behaves unexpectedly on the webpage
title: "[Bug] "
labels: "bug, needs-triage"
assignees: ""
---

## What's broken?

<!-- Describe what you see happening. Be as specific as possible. -->
<!-- Example: "The search bar doesn't work on Safari  -  nothing happens when I type." -->

## What did you expect to happen?

<!-- Describe what the correct behavior should be. -->
<!-- Example: "Typing in the search bar should filter the glossary cards in real time." -->

## Steps to reproduce

<!-- Tell us exactly how to trigger the bug. Numbered steps help a lot. -->

1. Open `src/index.html` in a browser (or the live site)
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Screen size**: (e.g., mobile portrait, 1440px desktop)

## Screenshots

<!-- If you can take a screenshot that shows the bug, paste it here. -->
<!-- You can drag and drop images directly into this text box. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else that might be useful: error messages in the browser console, links to similar issues, etc. -->
